# Claudiator

> Open-source library of 345+ production-ready Claude Skills (SKILL.md prompts) for Claude Code and Claude CoWork, built by Kalilur Rahman.

Claudiator helps engineers, architects, data, security, and product teams discover, preview, and copy reusable SKILL.md prompts across nine domains. Every skill is a self-contained markdown file with frontmatter (name, description, allowed tools) and procedural instructions Claude follows when invoked.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, daily skill spotlight, category grid, and project stats.
- [Skills Library](/skills): Search and filter all 345+ Claude Skills by domain, tool, and tag.
- [Favourites](/favourites): Skills you've starred (saved locally in your browser).
- [About](/about): What Claudiator is, the ACUITAS and CLARITY frameworks, and how to contribute.
- [Feedback](/feedback): Report bugs, request features, or suggest a new skill.

## Domains covered

- Software Development
- DevOps & Infrastructure
- Data & Analytics
- AI / ML
- Security
- System Design
- Testing & Quality
- API & Integration
- Product Management

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/kalilurrahman/kr-claudiator-skills): Source, raw SKILL.md files, and contribution guide.
- [Author portfolio](https://kalilurrahman.lovable.app): Kalilur Rahman — technology leader and AI builder.
